---
title: "May 22, 2026"
description: "Storefront API launches with full Products CRUD."
---

## New features

### Storefront API: Products

The public [Storefront API](/api-reference/products/list-products) is live. You can now manage your product catalog programmatically.

- **List products** — paginated `GET /products` with filters for `search`, `status`, `product_type_id`, `stock`, `attribute_filters`, and `sort_by`.
- **Create product** — `POST /products`.
- **Get product** — `GET /products/{product_id}`.
- **Update product** — `PUT /products/{product_id}`.
- **Delete product** — `DELETE /products/{product_id}`.

All endpoints are scoped to your tenant and authenticated with your storefront API key.

## Updates

- Product list responses now include consistent pagination metadata and clearer query parameter schemas.
- Improved error responses across product endpoints (`400`, `401`, `404`, `409`, `500`).
